The '''Pa'Lowick system''', also known as the '''Lowick system''', contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Lowick/Legends|Lowick]], and the [[Lowick asteroid belt]], source of the [[Lowickan Firegem]]s. It was in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], near the [[Kessel system/Legends|Kessel system]].

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] conducted experiments with Firegems to use them as high-energy power sources. The Pa'lowick [[Star system/Legends|system]] was quarantined and a task force of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] and [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] cruisers patrolled the region to keep out trespassers.
